{ "servers": [ { "server": { "name": "io.github.PostHog/mcp", "version": "1.0.0", "description": "Connect to PostHog and work with your product data through natural conversation. Query analytics using HogQL or natural language, build and manage dashboards and insights, control feature flags, run and monitor experiments, create and analyze surveys, track errors, explore logs, and monitor LLM costs. Results include inline charts so you can visualize trends without leaving the conversation. Browse event and property definitions to understand your data model, search across all PostHog entities, and look up PostHog docs for instant context.", "title": "PostHog", "remotes": [ { "type": Query and explore observability data from OpenTelemetry or dozens of other sources in your honeycomb.io account.

You can use the Honeycomb connector to:

Analyze SLO Performance:
‍\"Analyze my SLO burn rates and investigate the top three contributing factors\"

Generate Usage Reports:
‍\"Give me a report on usage of my application by iOS version\"

Troubleshoot Performance Issues:
‍\"Why are some users experiencing higher latency and error rate on my API server?\"

"692e4548c36b068dc2e481be", "collectionId": "68b05e2de975b4de7dd02d9d", "localeId": "68a44d4040f98a4adf2207b5", "htmlContent": "

Search for trusted causes to donate to or volunteer with from Benevity's database of more than 2.3 million verified nonprofits.

You can use the Benevity connector to: 

Find nonprofits by location and cause:
\"Help me find a verified nonprofit in Thousand Oaks, CA focused on mental health and specifically suicide prevention\" 

Discover local organizations addressing specific needs:
\"Help me find a nonprofit close to me that can help with food insecurity\"

Search for nearby donation opportunities:
\"Find animal shelters near me that I can donate to\"

The Learning Commons Knowledge Graph connects trusted instructional content and learning science into a shared foundation, so Claude can generate more precise, standards-aligned instructional content that supports coherent learning and reflects educational best practices.", "title": "Learning Commons Knowledge Graph", "remotes": [ { "type": "streamable-http", "url": "https://kg.mcp.learningcommons.org/mcp" } ] }, "_meta": { "com.anthropic.api/mcp-registry": { "uuid": "6e94f5fc-5dc8-4f0a-9fcf-741bcab4e034", "type": "remote", "toolNames": [ "find_learning_components_from_standard", "find_standards_progression_from_standard", "find_standard_statement" ], "promptNames": [], "isAuthless": true, "displayName": "Learning Commons Knowledge Graph", "oneLiner": "K-12 standards, skills, and learning progressions", "iconUrl": "https://learningcommons.org", "documentation": "https://docs.learningcommons.org/knowledge-graph/integrations/claude", "support": "mailto:support@learningcommons.org", "privacyPolicy": "https://learningcommons.org/privacy-policy/", "url": "https://kg.mcp.learningcommons.org/mcp", "author": { "name": "Learning Commons Knowledge Graph", "url": "https://learningcommons.org/" }, "slug": "learning-commons-knowledge-graph", "directoryUrl": "https://claude.ai/directory/6e94f5fc-5dc8-4f0a-9fcf-741bcab4e034", "permissions": "Read", "worksWith": [ "claude", "claude-api" ], "publishedOn": "Mon Jan 12 2026 16:21:41 GMT+0000 (Coordinated Universal Time)", "createdOn": "Tue Sep 23 2025 01:00:52 GMT+0000 (Coordinated Universal Time)", "updatedOn": "Mon Jan 12 2026 16:20:17 GMT+0000 (Coordinated Universal Time)", "logo": "learning-commons", "backgroundPattern": "Loop 1", "serverLabel": "kg.mcp.learningcommons.org/mcp", "itemId": "68d1f14431c6258a78bdad70", "collectionId": "68b05e2de975b4de7dd02d9d", "localeId": "68a44d4040f98a4adf2207b5", "htmlContent": "

Align to all 50 states' academic standards, break them into granular learning components, and trace learning progressions directly from Claude. The Learning Commons Knowledge Graph connects trusted instructional content and learning science into a shared foundation, so Claude can generate more precise, standards-aligned instructional content that supports coherent learning and reflects educational best practices.

You can use the Learning Commons connector to:

Generate standards-aligned project ideas:
\"I'm a teacher in Iowa. Generate three project ideas that address W.3.4\"

Create exit tickets for specific standards:
\"Today in class we will be covering 111.40.c.3.F. Can you please create an exit ticket for my students?\"

Generate practice problems for learning components:
\"I am an 8th grade teacher in Maryland. Please create extra practice problems to address the learning components of 8.F.B.4\"

Identify prerequisite skills:
\"I am a 4th grade teacher in California. A student in my new class is struggling with the concepts related to 4.OA.A.3. Which prerequisites should I focus on with them?\"

This connector is designed for K-12 educators and curriculum developers.

", "source": "auto-sync", "visibility": [ "commercial" ], "added_at": "2025-11-12", "useCases": [ "productivity" ] }, "io.modelcontextprotocol.registry/official": { "status": "active", "isLatest": true } } }, { "server": { "name": "org.opentargets.platform.mcp/open-targets", "version": "1.0.0", "description": "This MCP provides a purpose-built interface and instructions to access and interpret the data and analyses in the Open Targets Platform. The Open Targets Platform is a comprehensive tool that supports systematic identification and prioritisation of potential therapeutic drug targets, integrating publicly available datasets to build and score target-disease associations. It also integrates relevant annotation information about targets, diseases/phenotypes, drugs, variants, GWAS and molecular QTL studies, and credible sets, as well as their most relevant relationships.", "title": "Open Targets", "remotes": [ { "type": "streamable-http", "url": "https://mcp.platform.opentargets.org/mcp" } ] }, "_meta": { "com.anthropic.api/mcp-registry": { "uuid": "097ab77c-338a-421c-8ba7-3960c928a540", "type": "remote", "toolNames": [ "get_open_targets_graphql_schema", "search_entities", "query_open_targets_graphql", "batch_query_open_targets_graphql" ], "promptNames": [], "isAuthless": true, "displayName": "Open Targets", "oneLiner": "Drug target discovery and prioritisation platform", "iconUrl": "https://www.opentargets.org", "documentation": "https://github.com/opentargets/open-targets-platform-mcp", "support": "https://github.com/opentargets/open-targets-platform-mcp/issues", "privacyPolicy": "https://github.com/opentargets/open-targets-platform-mcp/blob/main/PRIVACY.md", "url": "https://mcp.platform.opentargets.org/mcp", "author": { "name": "OpenTargets", "url": "https://www.opentargets.org" }, "worksWith": [ "claude", "claude-api", "claude-code" ], "source": "auto-sync", "visibility": [ "commercial" ], "added_at": "2026-01-12", "useCases": [ "data", "life-sciences" ] }, "io.modelcontextprotocol.registry/official": { "status": "active", "isLatest": true } } }, { "server": { "name": "org.synapse.mcp/synapse-org", "version": "1.0.0", "description": "Discover and explore scientific datasets from collaborative research projects. "68b05e2de975b4de7dd02d9d", "localeId": "68a44d4040f98a4adf2207b5", "htmlContent": "

Discover and explore scientific datasets from collaborative research projects. Search Synapse for genomics, imaging, clinical data on cancer, neurodegenerative diseases, rare diseases, and more. Navigate project hierarchies and get detailed metadata and provenance to understand what datasets contain before you download.

You can use the Synapse.org connector to:

Search for datasets and projects:
\"Search Synapse for genomics datasets related to Alzheimer's disease\"

Retrieve entity metadata:
\"Get the metadata and provenance information for project syn12345678\"

Traverse project hierarchies:
\"Show me all the folders and files within the Cancer Research project\"

The connector is designed for private investment workflows, providing programmatic access to portfolio analytics and reporting data.", "title": "Chronograph", "remotes": [ { "type": "streamable-http", "url": "https://ai.chronograph.pe/mcp" } ] }, "_meta": { "com.anthropic.api/mcp-registry": { "uuid": "01744591-790c-471b-9452-f338eff230af", "type": "remote", "toolNames": [ "query-help-center-documentation", "get-help-center-article", "top-exposures", "run-query", "entity-search", "commitment-history", "investment-metrics" ], "promptNames": [], "isAuthless": false, "displayName": "Chronograph", "oneLiner": "Interact with your Chronograph data directly in Claude", "iconUrl": "https://www.chronograph.pe/", "documentation": "https://lp-help.chronograph.pe/article/735-chronograph-mcp", "support": "mailto:client.services@chronograph.pe", "privacyPolicy": "https://www.chronograph.pe/legal/privacy-policy/", "url": "https://ai.chronograph.pe/mcp", "author": { "name": "Chronograph", "url": "https://www.chronograph.pe/" }, "slug": "chronograph", "directoryUrl": "https://claude.ai/directory/01744591-790c-471b-9452-f338eff230af", "claudeCodeCopyText": "claude mcp add --transport http chronograph https://ai.chronograph.pe/mcp", "claudeApiCopyText": "https://ai.chronograph.pe/mcp", "permissions": "Read", "useCases": [ "financial-services" ], "worksWith": [ "claude", "claude-api", "claude-code" ], "publishedOn": "Mon Jan 12 2026 16:21:41 GMT+0000 (Coordinated Universal Time)", "createdOn": "Fri Oct 24 2025 19:48:42 GMT+0000 (Coordinated Universal Time)", "updatedOn": "Mon Jan 12 2026 16:20:15 GMT+0000 (Coordinated Universal Time)", "logo": "chronograph", "serverLabel": "ai.chronograph.pe/mcp", "itemId": "68fbd81a3d569c900eca5a2f", "collectionId": "68b05e2de975b4de7dd02d9d", "localeId": "68a44d4040f98a4adf2207b5", "htmlContent": "

The Chronograph connector allows users to query portfolio data, analyze investments, search for entities, retrieve performance metrics, and access Chronograph's help documentation. The connector is designed for private investment workflows, providing programmatic access to portfolio analytics and reporting data.

You can use the Chronograph connector to do:

Portfolio Exposure Analysis:
\"What are my top exposures to Health Care within the Client A portfolio?\"

Sector-Based Fund Search:
\"Which of my funds have exposure to Consumer Finance?\"

Fund Performance Analysis:
\"What is the performance track record of Huron Capital Equity V?\"
